label: Appliances
tagline: Find rebates on energy-efficient appliance upgrades
hero_description: Upgrade to energy-efficient appliances that use less power without sacrificing performance. From refrigerators to washers, modern models lower your utility bills and often qualify for rebates, helping you save upfront and over time.

label: Browse by Category
hero_description: Hundreds of ways to keep more money in your pocket all organized in simple to explore categories.

label: EV
tagline: Discover incentives for electric vehicles and charging
hero_description: Electric vehicles (EVs) run on electricity instead of gas, cutting fuel costs and reducing emissions. With lower maintenance needs and available incentives, EVs can save you money both at the pump and over the life of the vehicle.

label: Retrofitting
tagline: Save with incentives for insulation, windows, doors, and roofing
hero_description: Retrofitting improves your home’s efficiency by upgrading insulation, sealing air leaks, and modernizing systems. These improvements reduce energy waste, increase comfort, and lower monthly costs—often with incentives to offset the investment.

label: All Incentives
hero_description: Energy efficiency upgrades help your home use less energy to do the same everyday tasks. From lighting and insulation to smart thermostats and system tune-ups, these improvements lower your monthly bills, reduce waste, and often qualify for valuable rebates and incentives.

label: Heat Pumps
tagline: Explore incentives for efficient heat pump heating and cooling
hero_description: A heat pump is an all-in-one heating and cooling system that moves heat rather than generating it, making it far more efficient than traditional furnaces or air conditioners. In the winter, it pulls heat from the outside air and brings it indoors. Because it uses electricity to transfer heat instead of creating it, a heat pump can deliver up to three times more energy than it consumes. That efficiency translates into lower monthly energy bills, especially when paired with available rebates and incentives.

label: Solar
tagline: Explore savings on solar panel installation
hero_description: Solar panels generate clean energy from the sun, reducing your reliance on the grid and lowering your electricity bills. With tax credits and incentives available, solar can deliver long-term savings while increasing your home’s energy independence.
